zh-CN.name: 字母P
zh-CN.intro: P是英语字母表里的大写字母，它看起来像一面小旗子。字母P会发出‘啪’的音，就像吹泡泡的声音哦！

story.title: 🅿️小旗子P
story.body: 大大字母P，长得就像公园里的小旗子。风儿吹来，小旗P飘呀飘，真神气！小猪佩奇最喜欢字母P，因为她的名字开头就是P。她画了一个大大的P，涂上粉红色，贴在小屋门上。小羊苏西说：‘这是你的专属字母，P就是佩奇！’佩奇高兴地跳起来：‘P，P，我是Peppa！’小朋友们，你们也来找找看，身边有什么东西长得像P呢？半圆加一竖，就是快乐的字母P。P还会发出‘噗噗’的声音，像小汽车放气，真好玩！

knowledge.title: 字母P有什么用？
knowledge.body: 字母P是英语字母表中的第16个字母。很多单词都以P开头，比如‘pig’（猪）、‘pink’（粉色）。学会P的发音，就能读出很多有趣的单词啦。

en.name: P
en.intro: P is a big letter in the alphabet. It looks like a little flag. The letter P makes a 'puh' sound, just like blowing bubbles!

story.title: 🅿️Little Flag P
story.body: Big letter P looks just like a little flag in the park. When the wind blows, the flag P waves proudly! Peppa Pig loves the letter P because her name starts with P. She draws a big P, colors it pink, and sticks it on her playhouse door. Suzy Sheep says, 'That's your special letter—P is for Peppa!' Peppa jumps with joy: 'P, P, I'm Peppa!' Boys and girls, look around you—can you find anything shaped like P? A half circle and a straight line—that’s our happy letter P. P also makes a ‘puff’ sound, like a little car letting out air. So much fun!

knowledge.title: What is letter P for?
knowledge.body: P is the 16th letter in the English alphabet. Many words start with P, like ‘pig’ and ‘pink’. When you learn to say P, you can read lots of fun words!
